race.comment: TRIUMVIRATE (7) continues to race well without winning, placing in all four runs this campaign with a win looking imminent. He just found one better by a neck last start at Wodonga when well backed and while wearing a bit thin, he should get a good run here and figure in the finish. JENNI BASSETT (12) resumes. Her form last time in reads well for this, now with the Stokes yard (ex C Maher). She's jumped out well and should be respected at double figure odds in early betting. SHALAAKEI (6) has placed his past two and has each-way claims again with Jamie Melham on from a good draw. FOREVERE JEUNE (10) ran well first up here without the best of luck. She looks to have come back better and just needs a good ride from the draw to go one better.
